notes: Live Shopify Admin GraphQL 2025-01 validation capture for quantityRulesDelete with two never-created, non-sentinel ProductVariant IDs. The strict target proves Shopify reports PRODUCT_VARIANT_DOES_NOT_EXIST at the actual offending variantIds indexes, including index 1, and parity replay hydrates the referenced real price list through the captured preflight cassette before keeping the supported mutation local.
